name: Chaince Digital Holdings Inc.
summary: Corporate Formation and Structure The Company was incorporated in the Cayman Islands as an exempted company with limited liability on July 13, 2011. The Company conducts its operations through its subsidiaries in the United States, Hong Kong, and the Peoples Republic of China. Chaince Securities, Inc. is a corporation organized under the laws of the State of Delaware, United States.
